parameters.query: ={{ 'SELECT fingerprint FROM news_items WHERE fingerprint IN (' + $input.all().map(i => `'${i.json.fingerprint}'`).join(',') + ') AND llm_summary IS NOT NULL' }}
=UPDATE news_items SET llm_summary = '{{ $json.choices[0].message.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', summarized_at = NOW() WHERE fingerprint = '{{ $node["Shape for DB"].json.fingerprint }}';
SELECT fingerprint, headline, llm_summary, source_name, language FROM news_items WHERE scraped_at >= date_trunc('day', NOW()) AND llm_summary IS NOT NULL ORDER BY scraped_at DESC;
